response:
Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town, bringing the total number of dogs to 29. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog, increasing the total to 30. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, reducing the total number of dogs to 24. 

[address] is the location of Emily's rescue center. [date] is the date when the puppies were received. [time] is when the stray dog was brought in. [number] is the number of dogs adopted by the families on Saturday. [another number] is the number of dogs remaining in the rescue center after the adoption. [another date] is the date when the adoption occurred. [another time] is when the adoption took place.
